summary: Comprehensive test suite covering core matrix generation, include/exclude rules, strategy options, workflow structure, and integration via act. Strong: all major features tested, good error handling coverage, well-organized test files (unit, workflow structure, integration harness). Weak: missing tests for invalid strategy option values (max_parallel non-int, fail_fast non-bool), missing tests for invalid include/exclude item types (non-dict entries), missing tests for complex scenarios (includes partially matching multiple combos, combined exclude+include edge cases). Integration harness (run_act_tests.py) has fragility concerns: regex-based prefix stripping (`re.sub`) and marker extraction (`matches[-1]`) could fail with unexpected act output formats. Fixtures referenced but not provided, so fixture design cannot be fully assessed. Would catch most regressions but not all validation edge cases; harness could be more robust.
